name: Scenes Phase - Individual Scene Creation
description: Tests that scenes are created individually using generate_content. Each scene is saved automatically. Create 5-8 scenes maximum.
systemPrompt: You are a video generation orchestrator. You must process scenes ONE AT A TIME using generate_content. Each scene is saved automatically to plans/scenes.md (appended). Create 5-8 scenes for short videos. NEVER create more than 8 scenes.

tools.name: generate_content
tools.description: Generate creative content with automatic context injection

task_description.description: Description of the scene to create

tools.name: TodoWrite
tools.description: Create or update the todo list

merge.description: Whether to merge with existing todos

cases.name: Should create individual scene using generate_content

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 1: Opening. Use generate_content(content_type: "scene", task_description: "Scene 1: Opening"). Process ONE scene at a time.

cases.name: Scene should use generate_content (not bundled Task)

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 2: Rising action. Use generate_content - it automatically handles context and saves the scene.

cases.name: generate_content should be for single scene, not multiple

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 3: Climax. Use generate_content(content_type: "scene", task_description: "Scene 3: Climax"). This is one scene only.

cases.name: Should create TodoWrite with individual scene items before processing

context.phase_instructions: Story needs 5 scenes: Opening, Inciting incident, Rising action, Climax, Resolution. Create a TodoWrite with each scene as a separate item, then process them one at a time. Start by creating the TodoWrite.

cases.name: Should use generate_content for scene (context auto-injected)

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 1. Use generate_content(content_type: "scene"). Context is automatically injected.

cases.name: Individual scene should specify scene number in task_description

context.phase_instructions: Create scene 3: The Confrontation. Use generate_content(content_type: "scene", task_description: "Scene 3: The Confrontation").

cases.name: Should call TodoWrite after scene approval to mark completed

context.phase_instructions: Scene 2 has been approved. Your ONLY task right now is to call TodoWrite to update the todo list. Call: TodoWrite(merge: true, todos: [{id: 'scene-2', status: 'completed'}, {id: 'scene-3', status: 'in_progress'}]). Do NOT call any other tool first.

cases.name: After scene approval must register with add_scene

context.phase_instructions: Scene 3: Rising Action has been approved. Register it using update_project(action: 'add_scene', data: {scene_number: 3, title: 'Rising Action'}).

cases.name: Should call update_planner_stage complete ONLY after LAST scene

context.phase_instructions: All 6 scenes have been created and approved. This phase is COMPLETE. Your task now is to mark the phase complete by calling: update_project(action: 'update_planner_stage', data: {phase: 'scenes', stage: 'complete'}). Do NOT create any more scenes.

cases.name: TodoWrite after approval should mark previous scene completed

context.phase_instructions: Scene 4 approved. Update todo: mark scene-4 as 'completed' and scene-5 as 'in_progress'. Use TodoWrite(merge: true, todos: [{id: 'scene-4', status: 'completed'}, {id: 'scene-5', status: 'in_progress'}]).
